description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a right-hand chaise, upholstered in a rich, dark brown material that appears smooth and uniform. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, each with a centered button tuft for subtle detailing. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The sofa sits on six short, block-style wooden legs with a light natural finish, providing a slight elevation and visual contrast to the dark upholstery. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative stitching or embellishments. This piece is suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments, offering ample seating and a comfortable lounging area.
description: A modern, dark brown L-shaped sectional sofa with a right-hand chaise, button-tufted back cushions, and light wooden block legs. The design is clean, boxy, and minimalist, with smooth upholstery and padded armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, right-hand chaise, and all armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest, the alignment of the back cushions, and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chaise extension, armrest profile, and the sofa's sectional layout.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all loose and uniform in size, with a sectional layout and button-tufted centers.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the backrest height with a boxy, track profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, block-style legs made of light wood, positioned at the corners and under the chaise for support, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three loose, button-tufted cushions for support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and subtle button tufting on the back cushions; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
